args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Your Brightloom refund has been issued
Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: Three orders overcharged in the 12 May billing batch run have been refunded in full: ORD-5501 ($19.99), ORD-5502 ($19.99), ORD-5503 ($39.98), total $79.96. Root cause was a disabled double_charge_guard; the fix is live in billing-api v3.4.1. Full details in refunds-summary.md.
